title: Export API Contracts
description: REST API contracts for form export (single and bulk)

GET /api/admin/system/export.description: Export a single form's submissions or a database collection in a chosen format

formId.description: Filter submissions by form ID (ObjectId string)

200.description: File download with correct Content-Disposition filename

pdfMetadata.title: [form-name]
pdfMetadata.description: PDF document title MUST equal the form name — not 'all submission data'

404.description: No data found for the requested collection/formId

GET /api/admin/system/export/bulk.description: Export all forms' submissions as a single merged file (server-side). Client handles ZIP assembly separately using JSZip.

format.description: Only xlsx and pdf are supported for server-side merged export

200.description: Single merged file with one section/sheet per form
200.note: XLSX: one worksheet per form named after the form. PDF: one section per form separated by page break, each with form-name heading.

NOTE_bulk_zip.description: Bulk ZIP export is assembled client-side: the browser calls GET /api/admin/system/export?formId=X&format=Y for each form in parallel, then uses JSZip to bundle results into a .zip archive named 'all-forms-data.zip'.

fileNamingConvention.note: form-name is the exact FormTemplate.name value. Spaces are preserved; only characters invalid in HTTP headers are percent-encoded.
